first_paragraph: ***Pasqualino Cammarata, Frigate Captain*** ([Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language"): *Pasqualino Cammarata... capitano di fregata*) is a 1974 Italian-Spanish [comedy film](/wiki/Comedy_film "Comedy film") directed by [Mario Amendola](/wiki/Mario_Amendola "Mario Amendola") and starring [Aldo Giuffrè](/wiki/Aldo_Giuffr%C3%A8 "Aldo Giuffrè"), [Agata Flori](/wiki/Agata_Flori "Agata Flori") and [Ninetto Davoli](/wiki/Ninetto_Davoli "Ninetto Davoli").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

***Pasqualino Cammarata, Frigate Captain*** ([Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language"): *Pasqualino Cammarata... capitano di fregata*) is a 1974 Italian-Spanish [comedy film](/wiki/Comedy_film "Comedy film") directed by [Mario Amendola](/wiki/Mario_Amendola "Mario Amendola") and starring [Aldo Giuffrè](/wiki/Aldo_Giuffr%C3%A8 "Aldo Giuffrè"), [Agata Flori](/wiki/Agata_Flori "Agata Flori") and [Ninetto Davoli](/wiki/Ninetto_Davoli "Ninetto Davoli").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

The film's sets were designed by the [art director](/wiki/Art_director "Art director") [Adolfo Cofiño](/wiki/Adolfo_Cofi%C3%B1o "Adolfo Cofiño").
